targets.query:
from(bucket: "tomcat_jmx_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "ndb_operations")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ndb_ip"] =~ /^${ndb_ip:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ndb_version"] =~ /^${ndb_version:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["commit_id"] =~ /^${commit_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine"] =~ /^${engine:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["database_type"] =~ /^${database_type:regex}$/)
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "tomcat_jmx_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "ndb_operations")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["status"] == "success")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ndb_ip"] =~ /^${ndb_ip:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ndb_version"] =~ /^${ndb_version:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["commit_id"] =~ /^${commit_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine"] =~ /^${engine:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["database_type"] =~ /^${database_type:regex}$/)
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "tomcat_jmx_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "ndb_operations")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["status"] == "failed")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ndb_ip"] =~ /^${ndb_ip:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ndb_version"] =~ /^${ndb_version:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["commit_id"] =~ /^${commit_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine"] =~ /^${engine:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["database_type"] =~ /^${database_type:regex}$/)
  |> count()
  |> group()
  |> sum()

data = from(bucket: "tomcat_jmx_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "ndb_operations")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "duration_ms")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ndb_ip"] =~ /^${ndb_ip:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["engine"] =~ /^${engine:regex}$/)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ndb_version"] =~ /^${ndb_version:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["database_type"] =~ /^${database_type:regex}$/)

// 1. Count Successes
success_count = data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["status"] == "success")
  |> group(columns: ["engine", "database_type", "operation_type"])
  |> count(column: "_value")
  |> toFloat()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "success")

// 2. Count Failures
failed_count = data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["status"] == "failed")
  |> group(columns: ["engine", "database_type", "operation_type"])
  |> count(column: "_value")
  |> toFloat()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "failed")

// --- Filter data for duration metrics (SUCCESS ONLY) ---
success_data = data
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["status"] == "success")

// 3. Min Duration (Success only)
min_data = success_data
  |> group(columns: ["engine", "database_type", "operation_type"])
  |> min()
  |> toFloat()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "min_duration")

// 4. Max Duration (Success only)
max_data = success_data
  |> group(columns: ["engine", "database_type", "operation_type"])
  |> max()
  |> toFloat()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "max_duration")

// 5. Avg Duration (Success only)
avg_data = success_data
  |> group(columns: ["engine", "database_type", "operation_type"])
  |> mean()
  |> toFloat()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "avg_duration")

// 6. Combine Everything Together
union(tables: [success_count, failed_count, min_data, max_data, avg_data])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["engine", "database_type", "operation_type"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      engine: r.engine,
      database_type: r.database_type,
      operation_type: r.operation_type,
      success: if exists r.success then r.success else 0.0,
      failed: if exists r.failed then r.failed else 0.0,
      min_duration_ms: if exists r.min_duration then r.min_duration else 0.0,
      max_duration_ms: if exists r.max_duration then r.max_duration else 0.0,
      avg_duration_ms: if exists r.avg_duration then r.avg_duration else 0.0
  }))
  |> sort(columns: ["engine", "database_type", "operation_type"])
  |> yield(name: "results")

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(
  bucket: "tomcat_jmx_metrics",
  tag: "ndb_ip",
  predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "ndb_operations",
  start: v.timeRangeStart,
  stop: v.timeRangeStop
)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._value != "unknown")
